checkpoints.name: ERROR_HANDLING
checkpoints.evidence: No try/except blocks found around pipeline stages.
checkpoints.finding: Lack of error handling may lead to pipeline failures without proper recovery.
checkpoints.fix: Wrap pipeline stages in try/except blocks to handle potential errors gracefully.

checkpoints.name: ROW_COUNT_LOGGING
checkpoints.evidence: No.count() or logging statements found after transformations.
checkpoints.finding: Lack of row count logging may make it difficult to verify transformation results.
checkpoints.fix: Add.count() or logging statements after key transformations to log row counts.

checkpoints.name: HARDCODED_PATHS
checkpoints.evidence: Paths are read from environment variables.

checkpoints.name: SCHEMA_VALIDATION
checkpoints.evidence: No schema validation found before transformations.
checkpoints.finding: Lack of schema validation may lead to errors if input data schema changes.
checkpoints.fix: Add schema validation checks before transformations.

top_3_fixes: Add try/except blocks around pipeline stages for error handling.
Add.count() or logging statements after key transformations to log row counts.
Add schema validation checks before transformations.
